name: Pear-Rhubarb Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
Note: If rhubarb is unsweetened, increase sugar to 2/3 cup.
Filling: Thaw package of rhubarb. Wash, core, and peel pears; cut into 1/2-inch cubes. Add to rhubarb along with water. Combine sugar, cornstarch, cinnamon, cinnamon candies (red hots), and salt. Add to fruit mixture. Pour into greased 8-inch square baking dish. Dot with butter. Cover and bake in hot oven (400°F) for 10 minutes, or until bubbling.
Crust: Combine biscuit mix and sugar; add butter and milk. Mix with a fork. Drop by spoonfuls on hot fruit mixture. Sprinkle additional sugar on top. Continue baking until crust is done, 15 to 20 minutes.
